## Description

<!-- Describe the changes and why they are needed -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Security fix
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Documentation / refactor

## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, credentials or API keys in the code
- [ ] Input validation at all API boundaries
- [ ] No new SQL injection / XSS / path traversal vectors
- [ ] Rate limiting applied to new sensitive endpoints
- [ ] HTTP security headers unaffected
- [ ] Dependencies audited (`pip-audit` / `npm audit`)

## Testing

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`ruff check`)

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Any context that will help the reviewer -->
